title: ‘Muhabbat humare saath, shaadi Modi sahab se’: Kharge’s jibe at ex-PM Deve Gowda sparks laughter in Rajya Sabha
description: In a humorous jab during Rajya Sabha proceedings, Congress chief Mallikarjun Kharge questioned former PM Deve Gowda's loyalty, likening it to a romantic relationship gone wrong. His nostalgic quip about Gowda's bond with Modi incited laughter.
